title: Policy Optimizer - Manage Unused Rules
content:
This playbook helps identify and remove unused rules that do not pass traffic in your environment.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Maciej Drobniuch and Cortex XSOAR pack (PANOSPolicyOptimizer, community-supported).

Inputs — slack_user: Slack user to notify about unused rules.; email_address: User email address to notify about unused rules.; auto_commit: Specifies whether you want to auto-commit the configuration for the PAN-OS policy changes automatically (Yes/No)..

Integrations/scripts used: IsIntegrationAvailable, PAN-OS Policy Optimizer, pan-os-delete-rule.
